# Routing & API Surface

## CLI Commands
| Command | Arguments | Description |
|---------|-----------|-------------|
| `spectral play` | `<mood>` | Play a soundscape matching MOOD |
| `spectral moods` | (none) | List available mood profiles |
| `spectral info` | `<mood>` | Show detailed info for a mood profile |

## Command Options
### `play` command
| Option | Type | Default | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| `--duration`, `-d` | `int` | `0` | Seconds to play (0 = infinite) |
| `--bpm` | `int` | `None` | Override base tempo |

### `info` command
No options — takes single mood argument.

## Route Structure
```
spectral (root)
├── play <mood> [-d <seconds>] [--bpm <int>]
├── moods
└── info <mood>
```

## Authentication
- **None** — standalone local tool, no auth required

## Middleware
- **None** — click handles all argument parsing and validation

## Mood Parameter Validation
- Uses `click.Choice(list(MOODS.keys()))` for validation
- Case-insensitive matching

## Audio Output
- PortAudio stream via `sounddevice.OutputStream`
- Sample rate: 44100 Hz
- Channels: 1 (mono) for brown noise placeholder; 2 (stereo) for binaural
